common.demoBanner: DEMO — Not a live service. Do not enter real personal data.

hero.headline: Your council.
hero.subtitle: A single place for residents and staff to pay, apply, report and stay informed — from your phone, in English or Shona.

stats.title: Transparency, live.
stats.subtitle: Key council metrics, refreshed every 30 seconds.

services.title: Everything you need from the council.
services.subtitle: Choose a service. No account needed to browse.

rates.title: Rates & Payments
rates.desc: Check balances and pay via EcoCash, OneMoney or card.

businessLicence.title: Business Licence
businessLicence.desc: Apply for a new licence, renew, or transfer ownership.

buildingPlans.title: Building Plans
buildingPlans.desc: Submit plans and track approval, online.

report.title: Report an Issue
report.desc: Broken boreholes, potholes, refuse — logged with photo and GPS.

documents.title: My Documents
documents.desc: Receipts, certificates and clearances in one vault.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Budget, tenders, meetings, by-laws — all public.

transparency.title: Where your money goes.
transparency.subtitle: Ward-level budget, collected vs spent. Updated monthly.

news.title: News & public notices
news.subtitle: Stay up to date with announcements from the council.

wards.title: Building Bikita, ward by ward.
wards.subtitle: Active capital projects across the district.

cta.title: Get started in 2 minutes.
cta.subtitle: Register with your national ID and phone number — no paperwork.

footer.tagline: Bikita Rural District Council — a public service portal built for residents, staff and councillors.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Log in to manage your rates, applications and requests.
login.invalid: Invalid email or password. Try one of the demo accounts below.

register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Takes 2 minutes. No paperwork.
register.otpHelper: Enter the code we sent to your phone.
register.termsLabel: I agree to the terms of use and privacy policy.
register.otpError: That code doesn't match. Please try again.
register.passwordWeak: Password must be at least 8 characters.

chooseRole.title: Welcome back, Tendai.
chooseRole.subtitle: You have both a resident and a staff account. Which one today?
chooseRole.residentDesc: Pay rates, apply for services, track requests.
chooseRole.staffDesc: ERP dashboard, residents, reconciliation, service requests.

notFound.title: We couldn't find that page.
notFound.subtitle: The link may be broken, or the page may have moved.

serverError.title: Something went wrong on our side.
serverError.subtitle: We've logged the error and will look into it. Try again in a moment.

offline.title: You're offline.
offline.subtitle: We cached your last statement and receipt so you can still check them. We'll sync the rest as soon as you're back.

stub.title: Citizen portal
stub.subtitle: Dashboard, property details, payments, applications and service requests live here.

stub.title: Staff ERP
stub.subtitle: KPIs, resident directory, payment reconciliation, applications kanban and service-requests map live here.
